top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(bond_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(c.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'I'
    GROUP BY a.atom_id
) AS iodine_bonds;

SELECT AVG(bond_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(c.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'I'
    GROUP BY a.atom_id
) AS iodine_bonds;

SELECT AVG(cnt) 
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'I'
    GROUP BY a.atom_id
) t;

) iodine_bonds;

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(bond_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(c.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'I'
    GROUP BY a.atom_id
) AS iodine_bonds;
